overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City's urban infrastructure at night. The character moves from a covered walkway under an overpass through an illuminated corridor and emerges into an open plaza with towering neon-lit buildings.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the orange textured sidewalk under the overpass, following a pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead on the sidewalk, maintaining steady pace

entered.detail: large concrete overpass structure covering the walkway overhead
distinctive orange geometric textured pavement tiles
massive concrete support pillars for the overpass structure
metal safety barriers along the left edge of the walkway
tall street light pole illuminating the path ahead

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered pedestrian walkway beneath a massive concrete overpass. The distinctive orange patterned pavement stretches ahead, flanked by metal railings and support pillars. A single pedestrian walks ahead in the distance, leading the way through the sheltered urban corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: illuminated covered corridor with directional signage

events.description: character turns left into the illuminated corridor beneath the overpass

agents.ego_description: turning left into a covered corridor and continuing to follow the pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian continuing to walk ahead through the corridor

entered.detail: tall bright white vertical light panels embedded in the corridor wall
digital wayfinding signs indicating Corpo Plaza and City Center destinations
green futuristic car parked along the right side of the corridor

segments.scene_description: After turning left, the character enters a narrow illuminated corridor beneath the overpass. Bright vertical light panels line the left wall alongside digital signage pointing toward Corpo Plaza. A green vehicle is parked on the right as the character continues following the pedestrian through the enclosed concrete passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with towering skyscrapers

events.description: exiting the covered corridor into the open plaza with tall buildings and neon lights visible

agents.ego_description: walking out of the covered corridor into the open plaza area with neon-lit buildings ahead

entered.detail: towering futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows rising into the night sky
bright pink and purple neon advertisements glowing on distant buildings
curved elevated roadway structure arching overhead

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered corridor into a vast open plaza. Towering glass skyscrapers pierce the night sky, adorned with vibrant pink and purple neon signage. The curved overpass structure sweeps overhead as the scene opens up to reveal the sprawling cyberpunk cityscape of Night City.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered urban underpass that gradually opens into a vast, neon-lit metropolitan plaza. It begins by following a distant pedestrian along a covered walkway with orange patterned pavement, flanked by heavy concrete pillars and metal railings. As the character turns left, the environment shifts into a narrow, illuminated corridor where bright vertical light panels and digital signage for Corpo Plaza line the walls beside a parked green vehicle. The scene then expands as the character emerges from the enclosed passage into a sprawling open square, with the curved overpass sweeping overhead. Finally, the view opens fully to reveal towering glass skyscrapers adorned with vibrant pink and purple neon signage piercing the night sky of Night City.
